ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test */,
  "isolate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bacterial isolate tested */,
  "inoculum_concentration" TEXT /* Concentration of the inoculum used in the test */,
  "replicate_count" INTEGER /* Number of replicates for the test */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was performed */,
  "test_method" TEXT /* Method used for the test */,
  "test_location" TEXT /* Location where the test was performed */,
  "equipment_used" TEXT /* Equipment used for the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_isolate_id FOREIGN KEY ("isolate_id") REFERENCES isolates ("isolate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "isolates" (
  "isolate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each isolate */,
  "isolate_name" TEXT /* Name of the bacterial isolate */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of the bacterial isolate */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date the isolate was collected */,
  "isolate_source" TEXT /* Source from which the isolate was obtained */,
  "isolate_host" TEXT /* Host or patient from which the isolate was obtained */,
  "isolate_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the isolate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("isolate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "antibiotics" (
  "antibiotic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each antibiotic */,
  "antibiotic_name" TEXT /* Name of the antibiotic */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the antibiotic */,
  "spectrum" TEXT /* Spectrum of activity of the antibiotic */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the antibiotic */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number of the antibiotic */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the antibiotic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("antibiotic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test */,
  "antibiotic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the antibiotic used */,
  "concentration" REAL /* Concentration of the antibiotic in the test */,
  "zone_size" REAL /* Size of the inhibitory zone */,
  "test_result_date" TEXT /* Date when the result was recorded */,
  "test_result_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure the result */,
  "quality_control" INTEGER /* Whether quality control was performed for the result */,
  "qc_result" TEXT /* Result of the quality control */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_antibiotic_id FOREIGN KEY ("antibiotic_id") REFERENCES antibiotics ("antibiotic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., lab technician, physician, administrator) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test log */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test performed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the test */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was performed */,
  "log_time" TEXT /* Time when the log was recorded */,
  "log_source" TEXT /* Source of the log */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_logs_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test for which the report is generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report generated */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report */,
  "report_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report findings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., data entry, report generation) */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log */,
  "log_source" TEXT /* Source of the log */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
